description: Create a statistical analysis worksheet in GeoGebra using the inauguration ages of all 46 U.S. Presidents: {57, 61, 57, 57, 58, 57, 61, 54, 68, 51, 49, 64, 50, 48, 65, 52, 56, 46, 54, 49, 51, 47, 55, 55, 54, 42, 51, 56, 55, 51, 54, 51, 60, 62, 43, 55, 56, 61, 52, 69, 64, 46, 54, 47, 70, 78}. Generate a histogram and a box-and-whisker plot for this data. Include a text annotation in the view showing the calculated median age. Save the project as presidential_ages_stats.ggb to ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
